notes: Merge script report verified accurate: 103 nodes / 157 edges in, 103 / 157 out, no drops, no dangling refs, no duplicate IDs. Independently re-validated against all 10 batch files — every batch node id (103 distinct) survived into the assembled graph.

Could-not-fix section was empty and confirmed empty: no nodes missing id, no unknown node types (only document/file/config/function), no unknown complexity values (only simple/moderate/complex). Nothing to recover or remap.
Node-id correction rate was 0% — no upstream id-pattern issue. Complexity distribution is healthy (moderate 52, simple 29, complex 22), not skewed to one unknown value.
Confirmed the systematic cross-batch gap: all 157 original edges were intra-batch (0 cross-batch). Each file-analyzer only linked nodes within its own batch.
importMap is empty (pure-prose corpus) so 0 imports edges were recoverable, exactly as expected — no code structure invented.

Added 27 cross-batch edges, every one content-backed by an explicit markdown hyperlink between two corpus-internal documents that live in different batches (verified by reading source files, not inferred). Edge shape: type 'references', direction 'forward', weight 0.6. Spot-checked sources confirm links are in prose/link-sections, not code-fence examples.

Largest restored cluster: publication-readiness.md (batch 9) is the rc.1 hub that links to 13 batch-8 release artifacts (preview-pack-manifest, naming matrix, owner-approval-packet, the publication-evidence-05-12..16 snapshots, and operator-readiness dashboards 05-15..20) — these hub->spoke edges were all severed at the batch-8/batch-9 boundary.

Other notable restored cross-batch references: release-notes & quickstart (rc.1, b9) -> HERMES-SETUP (b1) and architecture/{cross-harness,observability-readiness} (b3); 1.8.0 release-notes (b7) -> business/metrics-and-sponsorship (b4); ECC-2.0-GA-ROADMAP (b1) -> 2.0.0 hypergrowth command-center (b10); ito-skill-pack (b8) & hypergrowth-command-center (b10) -> architecture/platform-value-loop (b3); SKILL-DEVELOPMENT-GUIDE (b2) -> examples/project-guidelines-template (b10).
No reverse/duplicate edges introduced; all 27 are net-new (source|target|type) tuples. Final graph: 103 nodes / 184 edges.
